subject: Remove CBS NodePort assignments
commit_message:
Remove CBS NodePort assignments

Exposing NodePorts is needed only for multi-site installations.

Issue-ID: OJSI-195
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2129
Change-Id: I1d6731d95a6c058f5b2e08708c153f31e2065476
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflucas@research.att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > Does anyone from DCAE Team knows the reason why dashboard is failing?
> 
> Not seeing this in my local environment.  There were no changes related to dashboard that I know about.  Will forward the log output to a dashboard developer.

The problem is that the dashboard stores a password value into an XML attribute.  The password is obtained dynamically at deployment time from AAF.  It turns out that occasionally the password may contain a character (such as "&") that is significant to XML, potentially causing a parsing error such as the one seen here.   The problem will occur only intermittently--the password is generated on the fly by AAF, so it is different on each deployment. DCAEGEN2-2139 is tracking this.
